In development

Marginalia.

Long-form written attention to free public lectures attended around Toronto. Each entry is a longer piece of commentary on one talk: what was said, what was worth saying, what was missed, and what stayed with me afterward.

TypeLecture commentary, long-form.
CoverageFree public lectures around Toronto.
CadenceDays to weeks after each lecture.
FormA piece per talk attended.
~ Long-form attention. Each piece is one lecture. The notes are written within days, never the night-of.
iWriting

Writing

↗ Pieces stay in their canonical section so each section reads as itself. They aggregate in the florilegium so the writing reads as a body of work.

Each piece is one lecture, written within days of attending. Subscribe via >open_transmission_.

  • No articles yet.
